posts.text:
Pete Hegseth wants to live in a world in which the US military can drop bombs on scores of children and face no serious media scrutiny for it. His vile claim that he can't wait for David Ellison to run CNN shows he pines for oligarchic control of media.

posts.text: Do not to treat serious matters of life and death like a sporting match or horse race. Presenting Trump with contradictions/binary choices can help expose his lies and incoherence. Do not turn him into a pundit; hold him accountable for his decisions.

posts.text: It is not simply that Trump’s lies have become more obvious or that war coverage brings out the best in reporters (although both are true). Several factors explain this bonanza of quality journalism and indicate tougher reporting is transferable to other issues. open.substack.com/pub/contrari...
